attributes.Sql Query:
select
NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
NP_SHIP_TO.PARTY_KEY AS SHIP_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
NP_BILL_TO.PARTY_KEY AS BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
NP_SOLD_TO.PARTY_KEY AS SOLD_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
CASE WHEN SPEP.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_END_USER' THEN SPEP.THEATRE  ELSE NULL END AS END_USER_THEATER_NAME,
CASE WHEN SPEP.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_SHIP_TO' THEN SPEP.THEATRE  ELSE NULL END  AS SHIP_TO_THEATER_NAME,
XPCA.CLASS_CODE AS POS_TRX_TYPE_CD,
XPCA.ATTRIBUTE1  AS THREE_TIER_DISTI_ORD_TRXTYP_CD,
CASE WHEN SPEP.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_SHIP_TO' THEN SPEP.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE  ELSE NULL END   AS SRC_RPTD_SHP_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN SPEP.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_BILL_TO' THEN SPEP.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE  ELSE NULL END  AS SRC_RPTD_BIL_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN SPEP.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_SOLD_TO' THEN SPEP.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE ELSE NULL END  AS SRC_RPTD_SLD_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN SPEP.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_END_USER' THEN SPEP.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE  ELSE NULL END  AS SRC_RPTD_END_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT,
NP_END_USER.PARTY_KEY AS SOLD_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
CAST(START_DATE AS DATE) AS START_TV_DT,
CAST(EXPIRATION_DATE AS DATE) AS END_TV_DT 
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_CMA_TRX_PRTS_EXT_POS SPEP
INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NPTL
ON SPEP.POS_TRANS_ID = NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER  JOIN 
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NP_SHIP_TO
 ON SPEP.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE=NP_SHIP_TO.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT   AND  NP_SHIP_TO.SS_CODE='CR' AND NP_SHIP_TO.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01' AND SPEP.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_SHIP_TO' 
LEFT OUTER  JOIN 
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NP_SOLD_TO
 ON SPEP.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE=NP_SOLD_TO.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT   AND  NP_SOLD_TO.SS_CODE='CR' AND NP_SOLD_TO.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01' AND SPEP.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_SOLD_TO'
LEFT OUTER  JOIN 
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NP_BILL_TO
 ON SPEP.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE=NP_BILL_TO.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT   AND  NP_BILL_TO.SS_CODE='CR' AND NP_BILL_TO.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01' AND SPEP.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_BILL_TO' 
LEFT OUTER  JOIN 
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NP_END_USER
 ON SPEP.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE=NP_END_USER.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT   AND  NP_END_USER.SS_CODE='CR' AND NP_END_USER.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01' AND SPEP.ENRICHMENT_CODE='CR_END_USER'
INNER JOIN
(
SELECT * FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.XXOTM_PHX_TRX
WHERE 
TRX_SOURCE_TYPE='POS'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY SOURCE_TRX_ID ORDER BY SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME DESC, REFRESH_DATETIME DESC )=1
) XPT  
on SPEP.POS_TRANS_ID = XPT.SOURCE_TRX_ID AND XPT.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE='POS'
LEFT OUTER  JOIN 
( select * from 
  $$GGSRCVWDB.XXOTM_PHX_CODE_ASSIGNMENTS     
 WHERE CLASS_CATEGORY='XXOTM_PHX_POS_TYPE'
AND OWNER_TABLE_NAME='XXOTM_PHX_TRX')  XPCA
on  XPT.TRX_ID =XPCA.OWNER_TABLE_ID

SELECT
Coalesce (WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ,N.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT) AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.SHIP_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY ,N.SHIP_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY) , -999) AS SHIP_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY ,
 Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY ,N.BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY) ,-999) AS BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY ,
 Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.SOLD_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY ,N.SOLD_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY) , -999) AS SOLD_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY ,
 Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.END_USER_THEATER_NAME ,N.END_USER_THEATER_NAME) ,  'UNKNOWN' ) AS END_USER_THEATER_NAME ,
 Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.SHIP_TO_THEATER_NAME ,N.SHIP_TO_THEATER_NAME) ,  'UNKNOWN') AS SHIP_TO_THEATER_NAME ,
 Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.POS_TRX_TYPE_CD ,N.POS_TRX_TYPE_CD),  'UNKNOWN')  AS POS_TRX_TYPE_CD,
 Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.THREE_TIER_DISTI_ORD_TRXTYP_CD ,N.THREE_TIER_DISTI_ORD_TRXTYP_CD) ,  'UNKNOWN') AS THREE_TIER_DISTI_ORD_TRXTYP_CD,
Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.SRC_RPTD_SHP_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT ,N.SRC_RPTD_SHP_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT) ,-999) AS SRC_RPTD_SHP_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT ,
 Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.SRC_RPTD_BIL_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT ,N.SRC_RPTD_BIL_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT) , -999) AS SRC_RPTD_BIL_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT ,
 Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.SRC_RPTD_SLD_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT ,N.SRC_RPTD_SLD_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT) ,-999) AS SRC_RPTD_SLD_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT ,
 Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.SRC_RPTD_END_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT ,N.SRC_RPTD_END_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT) , -999     ) AS SRC_RPTD_END_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 Coalesce (Coalesce (WI.END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY ,N.END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY) , -999 ) AS END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY ,
 Coalesce (N.START_TV_DT,WI.START_TV_DT)  AS START_TV_DT ,
CAST( '3500-01-01' AS DATE) AS END_TV_DT ,
'I'	  ACTION_CODE,
'I'	   DML_TYPE
FROM 
(
SELECT 
BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
MAX( SHIP_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY) AS SHIP_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
MAX( BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY) AS BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
MAX( SOLD_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY) AS SOLD_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
MAX(END_USER_THEATER_NAME) AS END_USER_THEATER_NAME,
MAX(SHIP_TO_THEATER_NAME) AS SHIP_TO_THEATER_NAME,
MAX(POS_TRX_TYPE_CD) AS POS_TRX_TYPE_CD,
MAX(THREE_TIER_DISTI_ORD_TRXTYP_CD) AS THREE_TIER_DISTI_ORD_TRXTYP_CD,
MAX( SRC_RPTD_SHP_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT) AS SRC_RPTD_SHP_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT,
MAX( SRC_RPTD_BIL_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT) AS SRC_RPTD_BIL_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT,
MAX(SRC_RPTD_SLD_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT) AS SRC_RPTD_SLD_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT,
MAX(SRC_RPTD_END_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT) AS SRC_RPTD_END_CUST_CR_GU_ID_INT,
MAX( END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY) AS END_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY ,
MIN(START_TV_DT) AS START_TV_DT
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_RBK_CMA_ENRCH_POS_TRX_LN
GROUP BY BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
) WI
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_RBK_CMA_ENRCH_POS_TRX_LN_TV N
ON WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT =N.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT

SELECT
SPEP.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID,
SPEP.POS_TRANS_ID,
SPEP.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE,
SPEP.THEATRE,
SPEP.START_DATE,
SPEP.EXPIRATION_DATE,
SPEP.ENRICHMENT_CODE,
SPEP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SPEP.BATCH_ID,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CMA_TRX_PRTS_EXT_POS SPEP
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NPTL
ON SPEP.POS_TRANS_ID = NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN
(
SELECT * FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.XXOTM_PHX_TRX
WHERE 
TRX_SOURCE_TYPE='POS'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY SOURCE_TRX_ID ORDER BY SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME DESC , REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1
) XPT  
on SPEP.POS_TRANS_ID = XPT.SOURCE_TRX_ID AND XPT.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE='POS'
WHERE (  NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT IS NULL  OR XPT.SOURCE_TRX_ID IS NULL )

SELECT 
ETPS.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID,
ETPS.POS_TRANS_ID,
ETPS.CR_GLOBAL_ULTIMATE,
ETPS.THEATRE,
ETPS.START_DATE,
ETPS.EXPIRATION_DATE,
ETPS.ENRICHMENT_CODE,
ETPS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
ETPS.BATCH_ID
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_CMA_TRX_PRTS_EXT_POS ETPS 
WHERE
NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CMA_TRX_PRTS_EXT_POS STPS
WHERE STPS.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID= ETPS.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID
)
